items.summary_zh: Anthropic：Project Glasswing是一项新倡议，汇集AWS、Anthropic、苹果、博通、思科、CrowdStrike、谷歌、摩根大通、Linux基金会、微软、英伟达和Palo Alto Networks等公司，共同保护全球最关键的软件。
items.summary_en: Anthropic: Project Glasswing is a new initiative bringing together Amazon Web Services, Anthropic, Apple, Broadcom, Cisco, CrowdStrike, Google, JPMorgan Chase, Linux Foundation, Microsoft, NVIDIA, and Palo Alto Networks to secure the world's most critical software.

items.title_zh: OpenAI宣布OpenAI Safety Fellowship奖学金项目
items.summary_zh: OpenAI：OpenAI宣布推出OpenAI Safety Fellowship，这是一个试点项目，旨在支持独立安全和对齐研究并培养下一代人才。
items.summary_en: OpenAI: OpenAI announces OpenAI Safety Fellowship, a pilot program to support independent safety and alignment research and develop next generation of talent.

items.title_en: Industrial policy for the Intelligence Age
items.summary_zh: OpenAI：探索面向AI时代雄心勃勃、以人为本的工业政策构想，聚焦扩展机会、共享繁荣和构建弹性机构。
items.summary_en: OpenAI: Explore ambitious, people-first industrial policy ideas for the AI era—focused on expanding opportunity, sharing prosperity, and building resilient institutions.

items.title_zh: 赋能智能体优先的流程重构
items.summary_zh: MIT Technology Review：文章探讨AI智能体如何通过要求智能体优先的运营模型转变组织流程。讨论了通过智能体中心工作流获得的非线性收益潜力，强调理解经济驱动力和避免增量试点方法的重要性。
items.summary_en: MIT Technology Review: This article explores how AI agents are transforming organizational processes by requiring agent-first operating models. It discusses potential for nonlinear gains through agent-centric workflows, emphasizing the importance of understanding economic drivers and avoiding incremental pilot-focused approaches.

items.summary_zh: Anthropic：近8.1万名Claude用户分享了他们如何使用AI、希望AI能实现什么以及担心AI可能做什么。这是有史以来最大规模的多语言定性AI研究。
items.summary_en: Anthropic: Nearly 81,000 Claude users shared how they use AI, what they dream AI could make possible, and what they fear AI might do. This is the largest and most multilingual qualitative AI study of its kind.

items.summary_zh: Anthropic：Sonnet 4.6在前沿编码、智能体和规模化专业工作方面提供前沿性能。
items.summary_en: Anthropic: Sonnet 4.6 delivers frontier performance across coding, agents, and professional work at scale.
